name: Fugue State
author: SlimeRush
bootlegger: The Fortune Teller gets a 0, 1, or 2 to represent the number of players they picked that register as the demon.
Players who choose a player their character would not ordinarily be able to choose, such as a Snake Charmer choosing the a dead player, they are Drunk for that night.
The Demon does not learn who the Lunatic is, nor who they choose at night.
Characters that think they are a different character (Drunk, Lunatic, etc.) learn that character when they die.
